videos.title: Post-operative visit — young patient after ganglioglioma surgery
videos.description: Clinic visit with a young boy after surgery for a ganglioglioma affecting speech and motor function, with Prof. Giv Sharifi.

videos.title: Facial nerve preservation in acoustic neuroma surgery
videos.description: Successful preservation of the facial nerve in a patient with an acoustic neuroma.

videos.title: Key points in spinal surgery — post-operative visit
videos.description: Important considerations in spinal surgery, with a post-operative clinic visit for spine patients.

videos.title: Anterior cervical surgery — patient gratitude
videos.description: Prof. Sharifi explains anterior neck surgery; a patient shares a thoughtful gift after recovery.

videos.title: After posterior cervical surgery — clinic follow-up
videos.description: Post-operative care tips following posterior neck surgery during an in-clinic visit.

videos.title: Patient artwork after clinoid meningioma surgery
videos.description: A patient's painting and gift long after successful surgery for a clinoid meningioma.

videos.title: Neurosurgery patient story
videos.description: Patient feedback and surgical education from Prof. Giv Sharifi's practice.

videos.title: Eight-year-old patient after brainstem surgery
videos.description: Prof. Sharifi discusses recovery in an eight-year-old child after technical brainstem surgery.

videos.title: Intramedullary spinal tumours — post-op and pre-op visits
videos.description: Overview of intramedullary spinal tumours with simultaneous visits to a post-operative patient and a surgical candidate.
